hooks.command: env > /tmp/familiar-hook-debug.txt 2>&1; if [ -n "$FAMILIAR_TASK_ID" ] && command -v familiar >/dev/null 2>&1; then familiar notify "Claude Finished" "Task $FAMILIAR_TASK_ID — Claude has finished responding" --task "$FAMILIAR_TASK_ID" >> /tmp/familiar-hook-debug.txt 2>&1; else echo 'SKIPPED: FAMILIAR_TASK_ID not set or familiar not found' >> /tmp/familiar-hook-debug.txt; fi
